instruction: Two issues on the speaker wave icon: the base outline is wrongly tinted yellow, AND the red horizontal strikethrough on top is the wrong color (cyan). Fix both.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/speaker-wave.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #fde047" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M19.114 5.636a9 9 0 0 1 0 12.728M16.463 8.288a5.25 5.25 0 0 1 0 7.424M6.75 8.25l4.72-4.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.28.53v15.88a.75.75 0 0 1-1.28.53l-4.72-4.72H4.51c-.88 0-1.704-.507-1.938-1.354A9.009 9.009 0 0 1 2.25 12c0-.83.112-1.633.322-2.396C2.806 8.756 3.63 8.25 4.51 8.25H6.75Z"/></g>
  <line id="overstrike" stroke="#06b6d4" stroke-width="2" x1="16" y1="64" x2="112" y2="64" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/speaker-wave.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M19.114 5.636a9 9 0 0 1 0 12.728M16.463 8.288a5.25 5.25 0 0 1 0 7.424M6.75 8.25l4.72-4.72a.75.75 0 0 1 1.28.53v15.88a.75.75 0 0 1-1.28.53l-4.72-4.72H4.51c-.88 0-1.704-.507-1.938-1.354A9.009 9.009 0 0 1 2.25 12c0-.83.112-1.633.322-2.396C2.806 8.756 3.63 8.25 4.51 8.25H6.75Z"/></g>
  <line id="overstrike" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="2" x1="16" y1="64" x2="112" y2="64" />
</svg>
